title: MobSpawner & Spawn Eggs DISCONTINUED
description: Craft mob spawner & minecraft spawn eggs.
body:
THIS MOD IS NO LONGER SUPPORTED. DOWNLOAD THE NEW VERSION HERE: https://modrinth.com/mod/craft-spawn-eggs-spawners


![Mod information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3234e28abf689e00227ce7df7e3e23c86943d08.webp)

MysticRift: Spawn & Reborn, With this mod you can now create any Minecraft mob! It is now also possible to create the mob spawner, go collect the new ores and items and create the grand XP / mob farm. we are working on: 1.20.4 (FORGE & NEOFORGE)

# WE ARE NO LONGER UPDATING: 1.19.4!



 Magentite: min -0  max 16
                             Deepslate Magentite: min -8 max 0 
Jadeitestone: min 1 max 265
Deepslate Jadeitestone: min -8 max 0
Abyssium: min -32 max 265
Deepslate Abyssium: min -8 max 0
ClaciteOre: min -32 max 64
Deepslate ClaciteOre: min -8 max 0
ThunderStone: min -32 max 265
Deepslate ThunderStone: min 0 max 64
RosetiteOre: min 1 max 265
Deepslate RosetiteOre: min -8 max 265
PinkauriumNethereckOre: min 10 max 117 (NETHER)
EndercoraliumOre: Min 10 max 67 (END)
Wither ore: -64 max 64
Shadow quartz ore: -64 max 64
Arctic jewel ore: -64 max 50

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35cb0f0308c81b432e46501f56994c4f352f9d04.png)


![Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/066556483d2cbcc5bd346e035624c4c5212879d9.webp)

Our team will update this mod with new tools and mobs as soon as possible.


![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35cb0f0308c81b432e46501f56994c4f352f9d04.png)

![wither](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be3fced9923243e6a85055cd81617c8271b8f2ff.webp)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35cb0f0308c81b432e46501f56994c4f352f9d04.png)

![Recommend you to:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b590349b38ea4744c4acc4d3658a0eb8f4d9be53.png)

We recommend that you download these mods for your server. creating the mob spawner/spawn eggs can be complicated.

[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
[Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
